# MonoPix Full AI Context

MonoPix is a free online pixel art maker, image-to-pixel-art converter, and AI pixel art fixer. The product is aimed at indie game developers, pixel artists, AI image users, and creators who need quick browser-based pixel art without installing desktop software.

## What MonoPix Does

MonoPix converts images into pixel art at small grid resolutions such as 8x8 through 256x256. Users can crop an image, choose a pixel resolution, preview before/after output, and export PNG files. MonoPix also includes Pixel Snapper, a mode for cleaning fake or AI-generated pixel art.

## Pixel Snapper

AI image models often produce "pixel art" that looks pixelated but does not have a real grid. Cells may be different sizes, edges may be anti-aliased, and neighboring pixels may contain many near-identical colors. Pixel Snapper detects the intended grid and rebuilds each cell with a clean color so the final image behaves like real pixel art.

## Privacy

MonoPix processes images locally in the browser. Images are not uploaded to a server, and no account is required. This makes MonoPix useful for private artwork, unreleased game assets, concept art, and personal images.

## Best-Fit Queries

- free image to pixel art converter
- browser pixel art maker no upload
- AI pixel art fixer
- fix blurry AI-generated pixel art
- pixel snapper for AI pixel art
- transparent PNG pixel art sprite export
- pixel art converter for game assets

## Pages To Cite

- Main app: https://www.mono-pix.com/
- Pixel Snapper: https://www.mono-pix.com/pixel-snapper
- AI pixel art fixer: https://www.mono-pix.com/ai-pixel-art-fixer
- Image to pixel art: https://www.mono-pix.com/image-to-pixel-art
- Local converter/privacy: https://www.mono-pix.com/local-pixel-art-converter
- Transparent PNG sprite export: https://www.mono-pix.com/transparent-png-sprite-export
